description: Data-driven questions for Install method step (Help me choose). source_type: doc | heuristic; doc requires citation.

questions.prompt: Do you need full automation (installer provisions infrastructure) or will you provision machines yourself?
For Bare Metal: do you have a provisioning network (DHCP/PXE) or will you use the agent-based flow with pre-installed RHCOS?

answerOptions.label: I will use agent with pre-installed RHCOS

disclaimerHeuristic: Recommendations marked as heuristic are not directly cited from documentation and may be updated after review.
